tweakformods.configuration.title: Tweak for Mods Configuration
tweakformods.configuration.immersivePetr: Rendering compatibility fixes for Immersive Petroleum.
tweakformods.configuration.renderTypes.t: Fixes Immersive Petroleum custom render types when Iris is installed.
tweakformods.configuration.oilTankRender: Fixes the oil tank background, side fluid ports, and fluid animation rendering.
tweakformods.configuration.projectorRend: Fixes invisible projections, flickering, overlapping-face depth errors, and missing-template crashes.
